sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 41:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 41:1
items.html: A light that is extended gradually, from coarser to more refined, and up to the most refined, is called “from below upward.” This light is called “reflected light.”
